## Summary

- Why is this PR needed?
- What changed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Release / versioning

## Scope

- [ ] manager
- [ ] runner
- [ ] shared docs / repository root
- [ ] GitHub workflows

## Impact and Compatibility

- [ ] No breaking change
- [ ] Breaking change (describe below)
- [ ] API contract changed (routes, payloads, auth headers)
- [ ] Configuration changed (`.env.example`, defaults, env vars)
- [ ] Processing behavior changed (`encoding`, `studio`, `transcription`)

Details (if needed):

## Validation

Mandatory before opening this PR:

- [ ] `cd manager && make ci` (if `manager` is impacted)
- [ ] `cd runner && make ci` (if `runner` is impacted)

## Documentation and Release Notes

- [ ] Docs updated when behavior/config changed (`manager/docs/*`, `runner/docs/*`)
- [ ] Changelog updated when relevant (`manager/docs/CHANGELOG.md`, `runner/docs/CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] Version update handled with `scripts/manage_version.py` (release PRs only)

## UI Changes (manager web)

- [ ] Not applicable
- [ ] Screenshots attached
